summary: Completed testing of TC Pro Dojo Classes page redesign and email notification features. All 10 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests pass - Classes page now shows day-based layout with only days having classes, multi-day schedules working correctly, same-time classes display side-by-side, TODAY badge shows, week navigation works. Admin Email Preview button and modal working correctly showing both cancellation and reschedule email formats.
critical_code_review_comments: Classes.js correctly uses schedule array to render multi-day classes (e.g., Beginner Pro Wrestling on Mon 6PM AND Wed 7PM)
Same-time classes on same day display side-by-side using groupByTime() function - verified Monday shows 2 classes at 6PM side-by-side
Week navigation (Prev/Next/Current Week) working correctly with formatWeekRange()
TODAY badge correctly highlights current day (Friday Mar 6, 2026)
Only days with classes are shown (6 days visible, Sunday hidden as no classes)
AdminClassSchedule.js has Email Preview button at data-testid='email-preview-btn'
Email preview modal shows both CANCELLATION and RESCHEDULE email formats with proper branding
Backend notify_students_of_class_change() function sends email notifications via Resend API
Admin route is /admin/classes (not /admin/class-schedule as mentioned in review request)
seed_data_creation: Used existing 4 test classes (Beginner Pro Wrestling, Boxing Fundamentals, Advanced Wrestling, Open Mat). Cleanup done for test cancel/reschedule instances.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Classes page completely redesigned from 7x15 time grid to day-card layout. Multi-day classes use 'schedule' array field [{day, time}]. Email notifications for class cancellations/reschedules sent via Resend to enrolled students with notify_class_changes=True. Admin class schedule page at /admin/classes has Email Preview button showing both email formats. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

classes_page_redesign.day_based_layout: Only days with classes shown (6 of 7 days visible)
classes_page_redesign.multi_day_schedule: Beginner Pro Wrestling on Mon 6PM AND Wed 7PM - WORKING
classes_page_redesign.side_by_side_same_time: Monday shows 2 classes at 6PM displayed horizontally - WORKING
classes_page_redesign.today_badge: Friday Mar 6 shows TODAY badge - WORKING
classes_page_redesign.week_navigation: Prev/Next/Current Week buttons work correctly - WORKING

admin_email_preview.cancellation_email: Shows TC PRO DOJO branding, CANCELLED badge, class details, reason
admin_email_preview.reschedule_email: Shows RESCHEDULED badge, original time (strikethrough), new time, reason

backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/classes: Returns classes with schedule array - PASS
